Claude Pre-Reads for BCG Senior Leaders
========================================

How to view:
1. Keep this folder intact (the index.html needs the videos/ subfolder beside it).
2. Double-click `index.html` — it opens in your default browser.
3. Click any of the 5 cards to watch a ~90-second briefing.

Tips:
- Speed controls are in the bottom of the popup (1x, 1.25x, 1.5x, 2x).
- Arrow keys (← →) move between videos. Esc closes.
- Your progress is remembered locally — already-watched cards show a checkmark.

Sharing:
- Send the whole folder (zipped). Recipients keep videos/ alongside index.html.
- For SharePoint: upload the folder, share the link, recipients "Download" the
  folder, unzip on their machine, and open index.html locally.

Questions: Shubhank Goswami (goswami.shubhank@bcg.com)
